hooks.command: HANDOFF=$(find "$PWD" -maxdepth 3 -name 'HANDOFF.md' 2>/dev/null | head -1); [ -z "$HANDOFF" ] && exit 0; LAST=$(stat -f %m "$HANDOFF" 2>/dev/null || stat -c %Y "$HANDOFF" 2>/dev/null); NOW=$(date +%s); [ $((NOW - LAST)) -gt 300 ] && printf '%s\n' '{"decision":"block","reason":"HANDOFF.md has not been updated in this session. Please update src/HANDOFF.md now with: current goal, what is in progress, next 3 steps, important files, and any blockers. Keep it under a page."}' && exit 0; exit 0
